From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**Sentiero 4 Luglio SkyMarathon** (SkyMarathon 4th July Footpath) is a [skyrunning](/wiki/Skyrunning "Skyrunning") event created in 1994 at [Santicolo](/w/index.php?title=Santicolo&action=edit&redlink=1 "Santicolo (page does not exist)") di [Corteno Golgi](/wiki/Corteno_Golgi "Corteno Golgi") by Giacomo Salvadori. Its main claim is "a real stairway to the sky".

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Sentiero_4_Luglio_SkyMarathon&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

Three times trial world championship (2003, 2004, 2007), for a few years (1999, 2011, 2012 and 2013) was organized in collaboration with [Aprica](/wiki/Aprica "Aprica") (SO); from 2014 is again organized only by [Corteno Golgi](/wiki/Corteno_Golgi "Corteno Golgi") (BS). It consists of two distances: classical [marathon](/wiki/Marathon "Marathon") and half marathon (this last, since 2000).[[1]](#cite_note-1)
